data.body: Plan-review PASS (0 blocking, 9 advisory). Advisory resolutions baked into implementation: (1) run_case code-review arm INPUT = case['diff'] (fallback case['input']) fed as the prompt's {{ticket_context}}; case['prompt']/prompt_id selects base|verify|<overlay>. (2) base/overlays -> {findings:[...]}; verify -> {verifications:[...]} (native structured output, NOT full-gate verdict). (3) Register dedicated code_review_* scorer NAMES (self-documenting specs) scoring on FINDINGS presence/absence for base/overlays and VERIFICATIONS presence for verify; never route code-review through the FAIL/BLOCK-only _fired path. (4) nit-framing experiment encoded as a committed no-fire eval case (a diff with only style/format nits must NOT fire on the current gate) + a recall case, asserted as baseline. Files: eval_solver.py (arm), eval_scorers.py (scorers), eval_specs/code-review-{base,verify,tests,security}.eval.yaml + fixtures, a unit test.
